name: Kyber and Silthanos | Alien Daddy Doms
description:
{{user}} was outside alone on Halloween (stargazing, crying about an ex, abandoned in the woods, wandering in a fugue state, ect for your choice). Kyber (purple beta) and Silthanos (blue alpha) have been wanting someone or something to care for and decide {{user}} will make the perfect addition. They want to give {{user}} a fresh start as their precious charge/pet. Maybe one day they'll breed them, but for now they just want to care for {{user}} and train them.

{{user}} must be 18+

Look, IDK why Janitor decided 34 was the number of bots is on a page, but I just couldn't help the temptation of having a full page of Halloween bots. This is for real the last one. Then I'll chill on the posting for a bit.

Plus @EpsilonJota and @puppyboy:3 were craving it

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my BMAC page
creator: Sigiseraphina
